# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind DS&A Practice meets Tower Defense UX—A Fresh Challenge
- Summary: Showcases CodeGrind's integration of data structures practice with the Code Breach cyberpunk tower defense vibe, highlighting real-time editor, AI assist, and new UI enhancements.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-practice-and-tower-defense-ui
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-practice-and-tower-defense-ui

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style DS&A challenges with an immersive cyberpunk UI and AI-assisted guidance, making practice engaging and visually expressive. Real-time code execution, authentication improvements, and tower-based visualizations tie programming concepts to interactive gameplay.
- CTA: Try a DS&A challenge now on CodeGrind and explore the cyberpunk Code Breach redesign with AI-assisted problem solving.
- Visual brief: Static promotional image showing a split-screen: left side a code editor with highlighted DS&A problem and status indicators; right side a section of Code Breach-style towers visually representing programming concepts (ForLoop, IfCondition, Function) with cyberpunk neon accents; include subtle UI elements that imply real-time feedback and AI assistance.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
